programs.title: Binance Signup Campaign
programs.guidelines: Refer new users to Binance, the world's leading cryptocurrency exchange. Payout is processed after the referred user completes their initial identity verification (KYC). Ensure referrals are from non-restricted countries.
programs.details: Earn rewards for every new user who signs up on Binance and completes KYC.
cons: KYC process can be a barrier

programs.title: Coinbase New User Bonus
programs.guidelines: Promote Coinbase to new crypto users. The referred user must sign up and buy or sell at least $100 in crypto within 180 days. You both get a bonus.
programs.details: You and your referral both get $10 in Bitcoin when they buy or sell $100+ of crypto.

programs.title: Metamask Wallet Installs
programs.guidelines: Get rewarded for driving new installs of the Metamask browser extension. User must install the extension and create a new wallet. Only desktop browser installs are counted.
programs.details: Promote the most popular self-custody wallet for Ethereum and EVM chains.

programs.title: Ledger Hardware Wallet
programs.guidelines: Earn a commission on sales of Ledger hardware wallets. Users must purchase a device through your unique link. Payout is a percentage of the total sale value.
programs.details: Promote the leading hardware wallet for ultimate crypto security.

programs.title: Earn with ChatGPT Plus
programs.guidelines: ChatGPT Plus is a subscription by OpenAI offering faster responses and access to the latest models. Every time someone subscribes through your link, you earn a commission. Only valid, unique sign-ups from real users will be counted.
programs.details: Refer users to ChatGPT Plus using your unique affiliate link.

programs.title: KuCoin Trading Fee Commission
programs.guidelines: Commission is based on spot trading fees only. Valid for the first 6 months of the referred user's activity. Great for promoting to active traders.
programs.details: Earn a percentage of the trading fees for users who sign up and trade on KuCoin.

programs.title: Bybit Derivatives Trading
programs.guidelines: Earn commissions from trading fees generated by your referrals on Bybit's derivatives platform. Ideal for communities focused on advanced trading strategies.
programs.details: Promote one of the largest crypto derivatives exchanges and earn from your network's trades.

programs.title: Gate.io Spot Trading
programs.guidelines: Refer users to Gate.io and earn a commission on their spot trading activities. Gate.io is known for its vast selection of altcoins, attracting exploratory traders.
programs.details: Earn a lifetime commission from one of the most diverse crypto exchanges.
cons: UI can be complex for new users

programs.title: dYdX Decentralized Perpetuals
programs.guidelines: Promote the leading decentralized derivatives exchange. Earn a percentage of the fees generated by users who trade through your referral link. Requires users to connect their own wallet.
programs.details: Earn from on-chain trading activity on the dYdX protocol.
cons: Gas fees on Ethereum can be high

programs.title: MEXC Global Futures
programs.guidelines: Invite friends to trade futures on MEXC and earn a high commission rate. Known for its user-friendly futures interface and high leverage options.
programs.details: Earn high rebates from one of the fastest-growing futures exchanges.
pros: No KYC required for some features
cons: High leverage is risky for users

programs.title: RewardRush Platform Review
programs.guidelines: Video must clearly show the platform's features (Quests, Affiliate, Education). Must include your affiliate link in the description. Must have at least 1,000 views to be eligible for the base payout.
programs.details: Create a video review of the RewardRush platform (min. 2 minutes) and post it on YouTube or TikTok.
cons: View count can be hard to achieve

programs.title: Crypto.com App Tutorial
programs.guidelines: Create a beginner-friendly tutorial on how to use the Crypto.com app. Cover topics like buying crypto, using the crypto card, or earning interest. Video must be over 3 minutes.
programs.details: Help new users navigate the Crypto.com ecosystem with a helpful video guide.

programs.title: Ledger 'How to Secure Your Crypto' Video
programs.guidelines: Create an educational video about the importance of self-custody and hardware wallets, featuring a Ledger device. The video should not be a direct ad but an educational piece.
programs.details: Educate the community on crypto security and feature Ledger as the solution.
pros: Positions you as a security advocate
cons: Requires owning the product to demonstrate

programs.title: Create a 'Top 5 Altcoins' Video on MEXC
programs.guidelines: Research and create a video discussing 5 promising altcoins available on the MEXC exchange. You must disclose your affiliate relationship and include your MEXC referral link.
programs.details: Create engaging content for the 'gem hunter' community and drive sign-ups to MEXC.
pros: Drives traffic to your referral link
cons: Highly speculative and risky for viewers

programs.title: Unstoppable Domains Web3 Identity Explainer
programs.guidelines: Create a video explaining what a Web3 domain is and how Unstoppable Domains works. Show the process of claiming a domain. Must be clear, concise, and professional.
programs.details: Explain the future of digital identity and promote Unstoppable Domains.
cons: Concept might be new to many
Less immediate use case for some viewers

programs.title: Tweet about a RewardRush Quest
programs.guidelines: Post a Tweet (X) about a specific, currently active quest on RewardRush. You must tag @RewardRushApp (hypothetical) and use the hashtag #RewardRush. The tweet must include a screenshot of the quest.
programs.details: Share your experience with our quests on Twitter and earn a small reward.

programs.title: Share Your Crypto.com Card
programs.guidelines: Post a creative picture or story on Instagram featuring your Crypto.com Visa card. You must tag @cryptocom and include your referral code in the post description.
programs.details: Show off your metal crypto card on Instagram and earn CRO.

programs.title: Promote a CoinMarketCap Airdrop
programs.guidelines: Find an active airdrop on CoinMarketCap and share it on Facebook or Reddit. Your post must explain what the project is and how to participate via your affiliate link.
programs.details: Help your community find new crypto airdrops and earn for sharing.

programs.title: LinkedIn Post about Web3 Careers
programs.guidelines: Write a thoughtful post on LinkedIn (at least 100 words) about the future of careers in Web3. Mention RewardRush as a platform for getting started and include a link to our 'Education' page.
programs.details: Share insights on LinkedIn and position RewardRush as a key educational resource.

programs.title: Create a Reddit Thread on r/CryptoCurrency
programs.guidelines: Start a discussion thread in the r/CryptoCurrency subreddit about the easiest ways for beginners to earn their first crypto. You must organically mention RewardRush and your affiliate link in a comment, not the main post, to avoid being marked as spam.
programs.details: Engage with the largest crypto community on Reddit.
cons: High risk of being removed by moderators

programs.title: Ramp Network First Transaction
programs.guidelines: Refer users to Ramp, a simple fiat-to-crypto onramp. You earn a reward after your referred user makes their first crypto purchase of at least $50.
programs.details: Help users buy their first crypto easily with a credit card or bank transfer.

programs.title: MoonPay Crypto Purchase
programs.guidelines: Earn a commission when your referred users buy crypto using MoonPay. Payout is a percentage of the total transaction volume for the first 90 days.
programs.details: Promote a leading payment infrastructure for crypto.
pros: Supports many currencies and payment methods

programs.title: Uniswap First Swap
programs.guidelines: Guide a new user to perform their first token swap on the Uniswap protocol. This is a technical task that requires a user to have a wallet and ETH for gas.
programs.details: Introduce users to the world of decentralized exchanges (DEXs).
cons: Gas fees can be a deterrent

programs.title: Crypto.com App Card Top-Up
programs.guidelines: Reward is paid when a user you referred tops up their Crypto.com Visa Card with at least $100 for the first time.
programs.details: Encourage users to start using their crypto for real-world purchases.
cons: Requires user to have staked for the card

programs.title: Aave Deposit
programs.guidelines: Refer a user who makes their first deposit of at least $200 worth of assets into the Aave lending protocol. The deposit must be held for a minimum of 7 days.
programs.details: Introduce users to decentralized lending and borrowing.
cons: Users must understand smart contract risk

programs.title: Purchase an Unstoppable Domain
programs.guidelines: Earn a commission when a user buys a .crypto, .x, or .nft domain through your link. No renewal fees make this an easy sell for long-term holders.
programs.details: Help users get their first decentralized, human-readable crypto address.
pros: High relevance in the NFT space

programs.title: CoinLedger Tax Software
programs.guidelines: Refer users to the CoinLedger crypto tax software. You earn a commission when they purchase a paid plan to generate their tax reports.
programs.details: Help crypto traders and investors solve their biggest headache: taxes.
cons: Users may be reluctant to pay for tax software

programs.title: Subscribe to The Defiant
programs.guidelines: Refer users to a paid subscription for The Defiant, a leading DeFi news and research platform. You earn a recurring commission for as long as they stay subscribed.
programs.details: Promote high-quality, independent crypto journalism and research.
cons: High subscription cost can be a barrier

programs.title: 3Commas Trading Bot Subscription
programs.guidelines: Earn a commission when your referrals subscribe to a paid plan on 3Commas, an automated crypto trading bot platform.
programs.details: Introduce active traders to the power of automated trading strategies.

programs.title: NordVPN Crypto Payment
programs.guidelines: Earn a commission when a new user purchases a NordVPN plan and pays using cryptocurrency. NordVPN is a top-tier VPN service that accepts Bitcoin and other crypto.
programs.details: Promote online privacy and security to the crypto community.
